
> @assalto-reale/authoritative-server@1.0.0-beta.1 test:coverage
> npm run deps:build && vitest run --config vitest.config.ts --coverage


> @assalto-reale/authoritative-server@1.0.0-beta.1 deps:build
> npm --prefix ../multiplayer-protocol run build && node ../../web/node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p ../game-core/tsconfig.json --pretty false


> @assalto-reale/multiplayer-protocol@1.0.0-beta.1 build
> tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
